nasb.text: An area 25,000 cubits in length and 10,000 in width shall be for the Levites, the ministers of the house, and for their possession cities to dwell in.

esv.text: Another section, 25,000 cubits long and 10,000 cubits broad, shall be for the Levites who minister at the temple, as their possession for cities to live in.

cnv.text: 其餘的一塊地，長十二公里半，寬五公里，要歸給在聖殿裡供職的利未人作為他們的基業，作居住的城市。

ccb.text: 另一块十二点五公里长、五公里宽的土地给那些在圣殿工作的利未人居住，作他们的产业。
